caption: A presentation slide titled "Neural Basis of Cognitive Empathy" is displayed, featuring a white background with a red header. The slide contains a photograph of a modern building campus with green trees and the text "MIT" placed to the right of the image. Below the image, three columns of data describe different participant groups: "Arab", "Control", and "Israeli". For the Arab group, it lists "n = 16 (8f)", "Age: 21.5 y", and "Years in U.S.: 5.5". For the Control group, it lists "n = 13 (5f)", "Age: 24.6 y", and "Years in U.S.: --". For the Israeli group, it lists "n = 16 (8f)", "Age: 29.0 y", and "Years in U.S.: 3.6". At the bottom right, a citation reads "Bruneau and Saxe, NeuroImage, 2010". The scene remains completely static across all frames, with no movement, changes in text, or additional visual elements appearing.
